faqs.a: Yes, 100% free. All books, past papers, MCQ tests, and course resources are free.

faqs.q: How do I get free Class 9 ALP books?
faqs.a: Visit ptbb.punjab.gov.pk for official free ALP books. Rightway Academy provides direct links.

faqs.q: Where can I check BISE Lahore result 2025?
faqs.a: Check at biselahore.com with your roll number. Our Results page links there directly.

faqs.q: How to prepare for MDCAT 2025 for free?
faqs.a: Use Noon Academy MDCAT lectures, our MCQ tests, and PMC past papers at pmc.gov.pk.
